name: Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter, egg, and molasses.
3. Add the Molasses Cookie Mix and beat until smooth.
4. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
6. Place the balls 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes.
8. Cool on wire racks.
